name: afo-cloudflare-api-mcp
purpose: Token-efficient access to the entire Cloudflare API (2500+ endpoints across Workers, KV, R2, D1, Vectorize, DNS, Zones, Firewall, Access, and more) via a 2-tool search+call pattern instead of one MCP tool per endpoint. search filters a cached OpenAPI index stored in R2; call makes the live authenticated request. Replaces the need for new single-purpose admin MCPs as new Cloudflare resource types come up.
